jobs.title: Account Director Enterprise Sales - Bay Area
jobs.content: <p><strong>Account Director, Enterprise Sales - Bay Area</strong></p><p>Pendo is the product-analytics + in-app guidance platform pioneered around product-led-growth-as-a-service & the digital-adoption-platform segment.</p>

jobs.title: Site Reliability Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Pendo's Engineering Operations function across the Insights / Guides / Feedback platform.</p>
